working_on.feature: Final audit of the 3 red MP2027 requirement sheets and packaging of the aligned program
working_on.notes: Core code paths are aligned with docs/MP2027, row 109-137 was re-audited, and the remaining gaps are source-data blockers rather than missing engine support.

pending_tasks.task: Collect real FY2027 headcount rows for CC 1412000089 in docs/MP2027/headcount_manual.csv
Collect real FY2027 NNN/VISA/GPLD event rows in docs/MP2027/special_costs_manual.csv or provide an official workbook with equivalent fields
Get confirmed FORM row mapping for Company anniversary and the nonparticipant company-trip gift item
If exact screenshot-only layout changes are required, obtain explicit text mapping for the 2 image-only items in Hang muc can cai tien

recent_changes.description: Aligned runtime defaults to docs/MP2027, improved rule parsing, added manual special-cost import, and protected NNN event items from incorrect auto-allocation.
Verified 16 tests, reran E2E on docs/MP2027, and confirmed the current DB has zero alloc_% rows for VISA/Passport/GPLD/NNN descriptions.
Updated business process notes, open-item checklist, and .brain context to reflect the true done/blocker state after the 3-sheet audit.
Reran tests, reran E2E against docs/MP2027, and rebuilt the packaged executable after the final documentation update.

decisions_made.decision: Treat docs/MP2027 as the only authoritative runtime source bundle
decisions_made.reason: The root-form/template set is older and contains stale sample formulas in rows that can pollute output.

decisions_made.decision: Use manual_special_costs.csv for NNN event costs rather than synthesizing them from headcount rules
decisions_made.reason: The requirement sheet describes an event-totaling workflow, not a headcount-driven allocation.

decisions_made.decision: Mark the remaining gaps as data blockers instead of open coding defects
decisions_made.reason: The engine can already accept the missing inputs once the user supplies them.
